name: Tequila-Orange Vinaigrette (Pyles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon juice, orange juice, tequila, and sugar in a small saucepan.
2. Cook over medium-low heat until the mixture reduces to 2 tablespoons.
3. Transfer the reduced mixture to a small bowl.
4. Add the orange zest and Champagne wine vinegar to the bowl.
5. In a measuring cup, combine the corn oil and olive oil.
6. While continuously shaking the vinegar mixtures, slowly drizzle in the oils.
7. Add salt to taste.
8. Makes about 3/4 cup.
9. Good with seafood salads. See Black-eyed pea crabmeat gorditas.
